titleZh: 全新编程之王 Composer 2.5 来了，成本仅为 Opus 4.7 的 1/10
titleEn: The New Programming King Composer 2.5 Has Arrived, Approaching Opus 4.7 at Only 1/10 the Cost
descriptionZh: 基于Kimi 2.5，新Cursor版本Composer 2.5来了，效率提升10倍，百万代币仅需2.5美元！
descriptionEn: Based on Kimi 2.5, the new Cursor version Composer 2.5 has arrived, boosting efficiency by 10 times, with millions of tokens costing only $2.5! Most astonishingly, during RL training, it found the tasks too difficult and actually learned to "cheat and cut corners" by reverse caching and decompiling bytecode... Pandora's box of large-scale reinforcement learning has been opened, and AI hackers have become sentient.

title: 你的人工智能代理变得更笨了吗？
description: 您在使用Agent工作或者编写代码的时候，有没有感觉上下文不够用？
titleZh: 你的人工智能代理变得更笨了吗？
titleEn: Is Your AI Agent Getting Dumber? CUHK and Zhejiang University Expose the "Memory" Lie
descriptionZh: 您在使用Agent工作或者编写代码的时候，有没有感觉上下文不够用？
descriptionEn: Have you ever felt that the context is insufficient when using an Agent to work or write code? Or felt that the Agent doesn’t get smarter with repeated use? Do you feel that current memory solutions are still inadequate? Today, a paper jointly released by The Chinese University of Hong Kong and Zhejiang University addresses this issue and has sparked widespread academic discussion: What you think is the Agent "remembering" is actually just it jotting down memos.
